source_jobs.description:
<p data-path-to-node="8">Thank you for your interest in Logan Premium Logistics. If you were directed to this page, it means the specific position you selected has just been closed or is currently at capacity.<br><br>However, we are constantly growing and positions often reopen.</p>
<p data-path-to-node="8"><strong>What you can do now:</strong> Instead of waiting for the job to be reposted you can submit your application here, we will keep your resume on file and when the role becomes available we will reach out.</p>
